input.memoryNote: I found a Notes app list on your phone titled 'how to say it right'. Six months of private practice sessions for the word 'charcuterie' because you kept saying char-coo-terry at restaurants. I'm keeping that list forever.

meta.tiktokHook: I found my boyfriend's Notes app. Six months of practicing 'charcuterie' in private. The list is titled 'how to say it right'. I love him so much.
